---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug or inconsistency in the draft repo or reference demo
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: Poke-nushi
---

## Area

- spec
- schema / example
- reference demo
- repository tooling

## What happened?

Describe the problem clearly.

## Expected behavior

Describe what you expected instead.

## Reproduction

List the files, commands, or payloads needed to reproduce it.

## Impact

Explain whether this affects `core`, `profile`, `extension`, or only the educational demo.
